package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

// scenario for stmt_without_close: Prepared statements or similar DB handles without an observed Close() call.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: idioms; severity: info.
func scenario398Negative(ctx context.Context, client *http.Client, url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	if client == nil { client = &http.Client{Timeout: time.Second} }
	req, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, http.MethodGet, url, nil)
	if err != nil { return nil, err }
	return client.Do(req)
}
